docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ROURKE, NICOLE HEARING SET FOR APR-13-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED DEC-07-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROURKE, NICOLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISS, KELSEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROURKE, NICOLE $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,515.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,600.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(I) IN BAD FAITH. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KELSEY WEISS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,400.00 FILED BY WEISS, KELSEY AS TO DEFENDANT ROURKE, NICOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
